Figure 7:Multi-λ\lambdafirst-passage trajectory and IS mechanism trace atN=200N{=}200.Top:strict val parse rate vs. optimizer step atλ∈{1.00,1.05,1.10}\lambda\in\{1.00,1.05,1.10\}, single seed4242, with the green errorbar showing the 3-seed mean atλ=1.05\lambda{=}1.05step196196(0.742±0.1070.742\pm 0.107).λ=1.00\lambda{=}1.00stays clip-safe;λ=1.05\lambda{=}1.05crosses the0.900.90band in[80,120][80,120]and lands at0.7030.703;λ=1.10\lambda{=}1.10crosses earlier and collapses to0.5000.500.Bottom:per-step peak training-side IS ratio (smoothed over1111steps; raw scatter in light dots),c=5c{=}5clip threshold marked. IS ratios stay well below the clip threshold for all three runs throughout training; the cliff is realised as cumulative drift past the asymptotic clip-unsafe fixed point characterised byThm.˜4.1, not as discrete clip-saturation events.
